verses.text: Full of the Spirit, tempted forty days, He answers, 'Man shall not live by bread alone.' Tested first. He overcomes the tempter by the word of God.
Full of the Spirit, tempted forty days, He answers, 'Man shall not live by bread alone.' Tested first. He overcomes the tempter by the word of God.
Full of the Spirit, tempted forty days, He answers, 'Man shall not live by bread alone.' Tested first. He overcomes the tempter by the word of God.
Full of the Spirit, tempted forty days, He answers, 'Man shall not live by bread alone.' Tested first. He overcomes the tempter by the word of God.
Shown the kingdoms for worship, He says, 'worship the Lord thy God, and him only.' No compromise. He refuses the world's crown on the devil's terms.
Shown the kingdoms for worship, He says, 'worship the Lord thy God, and him only.' No compromise. He refuses the world's crown on the devil's terms.
Shown the kingdoms for worship, He says, 'worship the Lord thy God, and him only.' No compromise. He refuses the world's crown on the devil's terms.
Shown the kingdoms for worship, He says, 'worship the Lord thy God, and him only.' No compromise. He refuses the world's crown on the devil's terms.
Set on the pinnacle, 'Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God'; the devil departs 'for a season.' Victory won. The foe withdraws, but only for a time.
Set on the pinnacle, 'Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God'; the devil departs 'for a season.' Victory won. The foe withdraws, but only for a time.
Set on the pinnacle, 'Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God'; the devil departs 'for a season.' Victory won. The foe withdraws, but only for a time.

Set on the pinnacle, 'Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God'; the devil departs 'for a season.' Victory won. The foe withdraws, but only for a time.
He returns in the Spirit's power and teaches in the synagogues, glorified of all. Mighty ministry. He begins His work in the strength of the Spirit.
He returns in the Spirit's power and teaches in the synagogues, glorified of all. Mighty ministry. He begins His work in the strength of the Spirit.
In Nazareth He reads Isaiah, 'The Spirit of the Lord is upon me... to preach the gospel to the poor.' His mission stated. He proclaims good news, healing, and liberty.
In Nazareth He reads Isaiah, 'The Spirit of the Lord is upon me... to preach the gospel to the poor.' His mission stated. He proclaims good news, healing, and liberty.

'This day is this scripture fulfilled'; they wonder, yet ask, 'Is not this Joseph's son?' Familiar doubt. They cannot see the Saviour in the carpenter's son.
'This day is this scripture fulfilled'; they wonder, yet ask, 'Is not this Joseph's son?' Familiar doubt. They cannot see the Saviour in the carpenter's son.
'This day is this scripture fulfilled'; they wonder, yet ask, 'Is not this Joseph's son?' Familiar doubt. They cannot see the Saviour in the carpenter's son.
No prophet is honoured at home; Elijah and Elisha were sent to a widow and a leper outside Israel. Grace to outsiders. God's mercy reaches beyond the favoured few.
No prophet is honoured at home; Elijah and Elisha were sent to a widow and a leper outside Israel. Grace to outsiders. God's mercy reaches beyond the favoured few.

Filled with wrath, they would cast Him from a hill, but He passes through their midst. Hour not come. None can take His life till the appointed time.
Filled with wrath, they would cast Him from a hill, but He passes through their midst. Hour not come. None can take His life till the appointed time.
Filled with wrath, they would cast Him from a hill, but He passes through their midst. Hour not come. None can take His life till the appointed time.
At Capernaum He teaches, and His word is 'with power.' Authority. His teaching carries a weight men feel.
At Capernaum He teaches, and His word is 'with power.' Authority. His teaching carries a weight men feel.
He rebukes an unclean spirit, which comes out; His fame spreads, for He commands the spirits. Power over evil. The demons obey His word at once.
He rebukes an unclean spirit, which comes out; His fame spreads, for He commands the spirits. Power over evil. The demons obey His word at once.
He rebukes an unclean spirit, which comes out; His fame spreads, for He commands the spirits. Power over evil. The demons obey His word at once.
He rebukes an unclean spirit, which comes out; His fame spreads, for He commands the spirits. Power over evil. The demons obey His word at once.
He rebukes an unclean spirit, which comes out; His fame spreads, for He commands the spirits. Power over evil. The demons obey His word at once.
He rebukes a fever in Simon's wife's mother, and she rises and ministers. Restored to serve. Healing fits us to serve the Healer.
He rebukes a fever in Simon's wife's mother, and she rises and ministers. Restored to serve. Healing fits us to serve the Healer.
At sunset He heals all the sick; the devils cry, 'Thou art Christ,' but He silences them. Wide mercy. He turns no needy one away.
At sunset He heals all the sick; the devils cry, 'Thou art Christ,' but He silences them. Wide mercy. He turns no needy one away.
He seeks a desert place; the people follow; 'I must preach the kingdom... to other cities also.' On the move. He will not rest where He is sought, but presses on.
